LIGS / IOC
Public product: Initial Operating Conditions generator.

Human UI: https://ligs.io/ioc

Machine-readable interface spec: GET any /ioc page HTML; element #ioc-interface-spec (application/json).

Public API (this deploy):
POST /api/ioc — body { "birthdate": "YYYY-MM-DD" } → { archetype, iocFree } (human/UI)
GET /api/ioc — query birthdate=YYYY-MM-DD → machine ioc_lite JSON (ioc_version, data, agent_rules)
POST /api/ioc/upgrade — body { "ioc_checkout_session": "<Stripe checkout session id>", "birthdate": "YYYY-MM-DD" optional } → machine ioc_full after paid unlock; else { ok: false, error: "payment_required" }
POST /api/ioc/checkout — body { archetype } → Stripe Checkout URL (full IOC unlock)
GET /api/ioc/verify-session?ioc_checkout_session=<id> — after payment → { ok, iocFull, ... }

Machine entry: GET /ioc.json — example_lite + schema URLs (/ioc-lite.schema.json, /ioc-full.schema.json)
OpenAPI 3.1 (IOC machine only): GET /openapi.json — GET /api/ioc, POST /api/ioc/upgrade

Stripe webhook: POST /api/stripe/webhook (platform only; IOC checkouts acknowledged without registry flow)
